description: Model a cylindrical piston with an O-ring groove for manufacturing. The base cylinder must have a 40.00 mm outer diameter and 50.00 mm overall height. The rectangular groove is 4.00 mm wide and 3.00 mm deep (resulting in a 34.00 mm inner diameter at the groove floor), positioned with its top edge exactly 10.00 mm below the top face of the cylinder. Save the parametric model to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/piston_groove.slvs and export the 3D solid as a STEP file to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/piston_groove.step.
